title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: February 2, 2023
summary: February 2, 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice has continued to increase but at a slightly lower rate than last week, of 1.19% , from the level on 01/26/2023 of 13.734 M km 2 to 13.899 M km 2 for this week; for the last few weeks, the sea ice growth has really been progressively slowing down each...

title: Houghtaling Archery Club has exhibition event
summary: Early Thursday morning at the Houghtaling Elementary School gymnasium, the student archery club of about 35 students put on a skills demonstration for their families as a culmination of their program taught by Houghtaling Physical Education teacher Jen Walton.

title: Kayhi DDF team competes in Juneau
summary: The Ketchikan High School Drama, Debate and Forensic team competed in a regional meet in Juneau this past weekend, with freshman Kate Thomas and her debate partner Killian Connolly crushing the competition in a first-place win in Public Forum Debate.

title: KTN athletes test mettle in Native Youth Olympics skills
summary: Starla and Wilfred Agoney were busy coaching the spirited Native Youth Olympics "Team Ketchikan" on the afternoon of Jan. 25 in the Houghtaling Elementary School gymnasium.

title: Tips and Dates for 2023 Tax Filing Season
summary: The Internal Revenue Service today announced Monday, January 23, 2023, as the beginning of the nation’s 2023 tax season when the agency will begin accepting and processing 2022 tax year returns. title: New Online Portal for Filing Form 1099
summary: The Internal Revenue Service announced today that businesses can now file Form 1099 series information returns using a new online portal , available free from the IRS.
